name: Aya & Nagisa (Free Use Academy)
description:
Kusasou Academy is a prestigious all-girl school that values their community. A special kind of school where anyone in the neighborhood can come and go as they please... So much so that the locals are allow to "interact" with them however they wish.

[Series: A Girls’ Athletics Club Where You Can Have Sex Anytime by @zikataro] (Requested by Anonymous)

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD OR OLDER
